typography.metric.sourceRole: Primary numeric metric value in Activity and MetricCard evidence.
typography.metric.writeTargetForFutureCycle: future registry/typography-raw-value-review-matrix.json; tokens/semantic.tokens.json must remain pending until a later acceptance review explicitly approves semantic token updates
acceptanceGate: Source role must match the token semantic role documented in the plan.
Future extraction must use only existing captured Summary Dashboard evidence and mapped source nodes.
Future raw values must first be written to a review matrix, not to tokens/semantic.tokens.json.
A reviewer must confirm the value is role-level evidence rather than source-specific polish.
No token may be accepted or connected to CSS during extraction planning.
rejectionCriteria: The source text role cannot be matched to the planned semantic token.
The value requires reading additional Figma nodes outside captured evidence.
The value comes from local runtime CSS or Storybook implementation rather than source evidence.
The value is Apple/platform-specific polish rather than transferable typography evidence.
The extraction would require writing raw values directly to semantic.tokens.json.
The value cannot be separated from decorative Activity color or progress styling.
